title: Double | Your AI Career Agent
excerpt: Double is your AI career agent. It gives you career advice, writes your resume and cover letters, grows your online presence, finds people who can refer you, and applies to jobs for you.
content_html:
Companies hiring through Double

What your Double does

Advising

It helps you figure out the move.

Talk through what you actually want. Your Double checks it against real pay and hiring numbers, gives you a straight read on where you stand, and hands you a plan you can start on.

Advising

Forget what looks good on a résumé. What do you actually like doing?

Design, honestly. But everyone says I should pick something that pays better.

Salary · Product design

$118k

median · within 5% of engineering

$92k$118k$151k

Within 5% of engineering by year five. One focused portfolio puts you in range.

Message your Double…

Find the fit

It matches you to roles that fit.

It looks at what you’re actually good at and finds the roles where you’d have the best shot, sorted by how well you fit.

Top matches

Roles that fitYour best matches first

Get you in

It finds your way in.

It finds the people who already know whoever you’re trying to reach, then writes the intro the way you would, in the right tone for who they are and about something they’d actually care about.

Warm intro

EN

Edie NovakSenior Engineer · StripeWarmFormer teammate

Your warmest path to Marit Kovac, research lead at Anthropic.

LinkedIn Email

Get found

It makes recruiters come to you.

It runs your LinkedIn, GitHub, and X: schedules your posts for when people actually look, tightens your profiles, and shows you who’s viewing, in recruiter terms.

62% of your profile views are recruiters and hiring managers.

The payoff

It applies the way that lands.

Every application is rebuilt for that exact role and company: resume, cover letter, and all the tedious forms. It does the busywork so you never waste time on it, and nothing goes out until you say so.

Applications

Applications0 sent this week

Research EngineerAnthropic · reframed around your distributed-systems work Sent

Backend EngineerDiscord · reframed around your scaling experience Sent

Infrastructure EngineerSpotify · tailoring now Sending

Resume, cover letter, and every tedious form, handled for each role. You never touch the busywork, and nothing sends until you approve.

01

02

04

Your Double knows the marketbetter than any job board.

0+Jobs indexed

Aggregated in real time across every major board, ATS, and company career page.

0+Data points / month

Labor market signals ingested every month across jobs, companies, and hiring trends.

0+Data sources

Job boards, government databases, social platforms, and company filings. Continuously updated.

Trusted by students at

Frequently asked questions

Your Double is an AI-powered career assistant that works on your behalf. It searches for jobs, researches companies, tailors your resume, writes cover letters, and even submits applications.

Yes, but only with your permission. Your Double prepares everything and shows you a confirmation before submitting. Nothing goes out without your approval.

Job boards show you listings. Double does the work. It searches across every platform, ranks roles by fit, tailors your materials, and handles the application end to end.

Double aggregates structured data from job boards, ATS platforms, government databases, social platforms, and company reviews, from primary sources, continuously updated.

Your data is encrypted at rest and in transit. We never share your info with employers without consent, and never sell your data. You can delete everything anytime.

Double offers a free tier with core features. Paid plans unlock unlimited applications, advanced resume optimization, and priority access.

content_html_zh:
通过 Double 招聘的公司

你的替身做什么

提供建议

它可以帮助你弄清楚动作。

谈谈你真正想要的。 你的替身会根据实际工资和招聘数据进行检查，让你直接了解自己的处境，并为你提供一个可以开始的计划。

提供建议

忘记简历上什么看起来不错。 你实际上喜欢做什么？

设计，诚实。 但每个人都说我应该选择薪水更高的东西。

薪资·产品设计

$118k

中位数 · 工程值的 5% 以内

$92k$118k$151k

到第五年，工程技术将在 5% 之内。 一份专注的投资组合让您处于范围之内。

给你的双打发消息……

找到合适的

它将您与合适的角色相匹配。

它着眼于您真正擅长的领域，并根据您的适合程度排序，找到最适合您的角色。

适合您的角色首先匹配您最合适的角色

回报

每个应用程序都是针对特定的角色和公司重新构建的：简历、求职信和所有繁琐的表格。 它会完成繁琐的工作，因此您永远不会在上面浪费时间，并且除非您这么说，否则不会有任何结果。

Your Double 是一个人工智能驱动的职业助理，可以代表您工作。 它搜索工作、研究公司、定制简历、撰写求职信，甚至提交申请。

可以，但必须经过您的许可。 您的替身已准备好一切，并在提交前向您显示确认信息。 未经您的批准，任何事情都不会出去。

求职板向您显示列表。 双倍的工作。 它在每个平台上进行搜索，按适合程度对角色进行排名，定制您的材料，并端到端地处理应用程序。

Double 汇总了来自招聘委员会、ATS 平台、政府数据库、社交平台和公司评论的结构化数据，这些数据来自主要来源，并不断更新。

您的数据在静态和传输过程中都会被加密。 未经同意，我们绝不会与雇主分享您的信息，也绝不会出售您的数据。 您可以随时删除所有内容。

Double 提供具有核心功能的免费套餐。 付费计划可解锁无限的应用程序、高级简历优化和优先访问权。
